theme.SearchBar.label.description: The ARIA label for search button

theme.SearchBar.placeholder.description: The placeholder for search bar input

theme.SearchPage.inputPlaceholder.description: The placeholder for search page input

theme.SearchPage.existingResultsTitle.description: The search page title for non-empty query

theme.SearchPage.emptyResultsTitle.description: The search page title for empty query

theme.SearchPage.resultsCount.description: The placeholder for number of search results

theme.SearchPage.fetchingNewResults.description: The placeholder for fetching new search results

theme.SearchPage.noResultsText.description: The placeholder text when no search results are found

theme.SearchPage.seeAllResults.description: The link text to see all search results
